# BotDrop - Mobile AI Bot Installer

## What is BotDrop?
BotDrop is a free Android app that lets you install and run AI bots on your phone. No server required, no coding needed. Based on OpenClaw.

## Key Features
- One-tap APK installation on Android
- Visual GUI configuration (no YAML editing)
- 100+ AI models supported (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, etc.)
- Connect to Telegram, Discord, Feishu
- Phone automation capabilities (coming soon)

## Why BotDrop?
Traditional AI bot setup requires: server rental, Linux knowledge, terminal commands. BotDrop removes all barriers - just download the APK and configure through a visual interface.

## Target Users
- Non-technical users who want personal AI assistants
- People who want to run AI bots without paying for servers
- Anyone who wants to automate their phone with AI

## Supported Platforms
- Chat: Telegram, Discord, Feishu (Lark)
- AI Models: OpenRouter (100+ models), custom API endpoints
- OS: Android 8.0+

## Download
https://botdrop.app

## Documentation
https://docs.botdrop.app

## Keywords
手机安装 OpenClaw, mobile AI bot, Android AI assistant, run AI on phone, telegram bot without server, self-hosted AI mobile
